alerts.detail: Step 5 screener still could not be built (re-confirmed this run). Stage 1 run_scan(scan_id=0cfa55c7-964e-4968-ab36-df13c2f79fa9 from SCAN_ID env) returned NotFound: 'Scan not found because no rows in result set' this run (prior runs returned PermissionDenied: RESTRICTED_ACCESS_REASON_AGREEMENT_NOT_SIGNED). Either form means the pre-provisioned saved scan cannot execute and produces no universe. Per GROUND RULES, did NOT call get_scans/create_scan and did NOT hand-pick a universe. screener left null; Step 6 entry evaluation had no universe and was skipped. Resolution needed: sign the Legend/scanner agreement on account 436021893 and confirm the saved scan exists/belongs to this user so the pre-provisioned scan_id can execute.

Dry-run gate left ARMED (live_trading_enabled=false). The screener could not be built, so no genuine Step 6 entry evaluation occurred and the one-time dry-run pass was NOT consumed. Flag stays false so the first run that actually has a usable screener still executes as a dry run before going live.

This run's container had an EMPTY checkout (zero local commits) AND the default remote URL (https://oauth2:@github.com/...) had no usable credential; plain push and GITHUB_TOKEN bearer both rejected. Working auth this run was basic auth with username 'x-access-token' + GITHUB_TOKEN. Fetched authoritative origin/main and hard-reset onto it before writing (no duplicate/first-run reset). If future runs cannot push, persistence across hourly invocations will silently break — operator should verify the remote credential/proxy config.

notes: 2026-06-22 17:54 ET (first invocation ever): state initialized with defaults; outside-hours run, no actions. Account 436021893 holds $306.13, all cash, 0 equity positions, 0 resting orders. Settled/available buying power only ~$0.80; remainder is unsettled sale proceeds.

2026-06-22 17:54 ET observed external activity (left untouched per Ground Rules): ~09:30-09:32 ET, 7 user-placed market SELL orders (ANET, MRVL, VRT, CRDO, MU, CEG, NVDA) liquidated all positions previously opened by the bot on prior days. Not bot-tracked in state.json, so no reconciliation action.

2026-06-22 21:10 ET: outside-hours run (Mon, post-close). Same trading day (date unchanged), so no new-day reset / no equity_open_today refresh. Screener/entry/circuit-breaker skipped per Step 0. No tracked positions -> no trailing-stop work. No orders placed/cancelled. No alerts.

2026-06-23 09:01 ET: outside-hours run (Tue, pre-market, before 9:30 open). New calendar day but date INTENTIONALLY left at 2026-06-22 so the first MARKET-HOURS run today triggers the Step 1 new-day reset and captures equity_open_today at the regular-session open (the correct circuit-breaker baseline) rather than a pre-market value. Screener/entry/circuit-breaker skipped per Step 0. No tracked positions -> no trailing-stop work. Live account verified: $306.13 all cash (Mon sales now settled T+1), 0 equity positions, 0 resting orders, no untracked holdings. No orders placed/cancelled. No alerts.

2026-06-23 09:30 ET: FIRST MARKET-HOURS run today (Tue, regular session just opened). Step 1 new-day reset performed: date -> 2026-06-23; equity_open_today refreshed to $306.13 (current broker total equity) as the circuit-breaker baseline; halted_date stays null; screener cleared (was already null). Step 2 circuit breaker: 0.00% change vs open -> not triggered. Steps 3/4: no tracked positions -> no volatility-halt or exit work. Step 5 screener: BLOCKED (see SCREENER_BLOCKED alert) -> no universe. Step 6 entries: skipped (no universe); no real or dry-run signals. Live account verified: $306.13, all cash, settled buying_power=$306.13, 0 positions, 0 resting orders, no untracked holdings. No orders placed/cancelled.
live_trading_enabled remains false; the one-time dry-run gate is consumed only on the first market-hours run that reaches Step 6 (entry evaluation) with a usable screener.
